features.notes: Adds the full RDKit web-worker stack and ml-creation utilities; substructure-filter-tests covers the filter widget.
Adds bit-birch clustering core, worker, and WASM glue; the Butina clustering script lives under scripts/.
AST baseline missed analysis/r-group-analysis.ts and most-common-subs (MCS) which are the actual core.
AST baseline missed several MMP submodules: mmpa-fragments/generations/differences/misc, mmp-mol-rendering/react-toolkit/substruct-provider/utils, mmpa-activity-cell-renderer.
AST baseline missed analysis/mpo.ts (MpoProfileDialog) and the mpo-scores-viewer.
AST baseline missed widgets/structural-alerts.ts (the panel widget itself).
AST baseline missed widgets/pharmacophore-features.ts and the dedicated test file.
AST baseline missed atom-picker-controller, mol3d-hover-handler, molecule-label, and the OCL cell renderer.
AST baseline missed notation-converter-tests.ts and chem-common-ocl.ts (used by convertToV3KViaOCL).
AST baseline missed sketcher-tests.ts despite the matching name.
AST baseline missed the entire utils/reaction-enumeration/ directory (Reaction Enumerator app) and the dedicated test file.
AST baseline missed chemprop-tests.ts. Implementation is mostly registrations in package.ts that delegate to Python scripts.
AST baseline missed malformed-data-utils.ts and the menu-tests-script-based.ts test file (which exercises Curate and Mutate).
